sample_mismatches.gsap: If turn number is even, replace random ailments with +1 health on two friends.
sample_mismatches.ours: Replace random ailments with +1 {HealthIcon} health on two friends.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Make the last perk-less enemy Spooked.
sample_mismatches.ours: Make the last perk-less enemy Spooked {ScaredIcon}.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Give Walnut perk to nearest friend behind.
sample_mismatches.ours: Gain the Walnut {PerkIcon} perk.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Deal 1 damage to the first enemy. Works 2 times per battle.
sample_mismatches.ours: Deal 1 {DamageIcon} damage to the first enemy.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Takes 1 less damage. Works 2 times per turn.
sample_mismatches.ours: Takes 1 less damage.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Gain +1 attack and +1 health per Faint friend.
sample_mismatches.ours: Gain +1 {AttackIcon} attack and +1 {HealthIcon} health per {0} friend.

sample_mismatches.gsap: If you have a toy, gain +2 health.
sample_mismatches.ours: Gain +2 {HealthIcon} health.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Give friends plenty of useful perks!
sample_mismatches.ours: Give friends plenty of useful perks! {HealthIcon}

sample_mismatches.gsap: Gain +1 health. Works 3 times per turn.
sample_mismatches.ours: Gain +1 {HealthIcon} health.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Give one random Faint pet in the shop +1 attack and +1 health.
sample_mismatches.ours: Give one random {0} pet in the shop +1 {AttackIcon} attack and +1 {HealthIcon} h

sample_mismatches.gsap: Gain 2 bonus mana. Works 2 times per turn.
sample_mismatches.ours: Gain 2 bonus {ManaIcon} mana.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Give it the Strawberry perk until next turn. Works 1 time per turn.
sample_mismatches.ours: Give it the Strawberry perk until next turn.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Activate End Turn on one random tier 2 or lower friend.
sample_mismatches.ours: Activate End Turn on one random tier 2 or lower friend.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Give it +1 health. Works 2 times per turn.
sample_mismatches.ours: Give it +1 {HealthIcon} health.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Make the nearest friend ahead Dazed.
sample_mismatches.ours: Make the nearest friend ahead Dazed {DeafIcon}.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Make one random perk-less enemy Toasty.
sample_mismatches.ours: Make one random perk-less enemy Toasty {ToastyIcon}.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Give them +1 attack until next turn. Works 3 times per turn.
sample_mismatches.ours: Give them +1 {AttackIcon} attack until next turn.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Gain +3 health until next turn. Works 2 times per turn.
sample_mismatches.ours: Gain +3 {HealthIcon} health until next turn.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Give one level 2 Sell friend +1 experience.
sample_mismatches.ours: Give one level 2 Sell friend +1 {ExpIcon} experience.

sample_mismatches.gsap: Make one random enemy Weak. Works 1 time per battle.
sample_mismatches.ours: Make one random enemy Weak {WeakIcon}.
